context.projectOverview: agent-bober: brownfield TypeScript/Node multi-mode software engineering teammate. Pipeline (src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts) runs planner → curator → generator → evaluator. Sprint 5 inserts an ADVISORY code-reviewer AFTER evaluator pass. Highest regression-risk sprint of Tier 1: touches src/orchestrator/. Must be LOCALIZED additive change at ONE decision point.

completedSprints.title: Anti-pattern catalog .bober/anti-patterns/ + evaluator Step 6.5
completedSprints.summary: Skill body MUST cite these by path: .bober/anti-patterns/{testing-anti-patterns,condition-based-waiting,root-cause-tracing,defense-in-depth}.md

notes: The Sprint Briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260524-bober-vision-5-briefing.md contains the FULL implementation plan: the exact decision-point line numbers (pipeline.ts:329-348), the exact subagent-spawn pattern to clone (curator-agent.ts:57-87), the exact file-write pattern (briefing-state.ts:5-29), the exact config-schema location to add codeReview.timeoutMs (schema.ts:130 after CuratorSectionSchema), and the EvalResult flow (NOT on disk — must pass via prompt). READ THE BRIEFING FIRST — don't re-explore.
